notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Jacob Misiorowski. Jakob Marsee scores. Xavier Edwards to 3rd. Otto Lopez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Stowers plunked
notableEvents.detail: Marlins challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Kyle Stowers hit by pitch.

notableEvents.label: Agustín Ramírez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Agustín Ramírez grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop David Hamilton to first baseman Jake Bauers. Xavier Edwards scores. Otto Lopez to 3rd. Kyle Stowers out at 2nd. Agustín Ramírez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Agustín Ramírez rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Agustín Ramírez grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop David Hamilton to first baseman Jake Bauers. Xavier Edwards scores. Otto Lopez to 3rd. Kyle Stowers out at 2nd. Agustín Ramírez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Javier Sanoja pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Javier Sanoja singles on a line drive to center fielder Brandon Lockridge. Liam Hicks scores. Owen Caissie scores. Javier Sanoja to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Javier Sanoja pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Javier Sanoja flies out to left fielder Brandon Lockridge.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Otto Lopez reaches on a fielder's choice. Jakob Marsee to 3rd. Xavier Edwards to 2nd. Fielding error by shortstop David Hamilton.

notableEvents.label: Gary Sánchez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gary Sánchez grounds into a double play, third baseman Graham Pauley to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Connor Norby. Brice Turang out at 2nd. Gary Sánchez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: David Hamilton steals (5) 2nd base. David Hamilton to 3rd. David Hamilton advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Liam Hicks.

notableEvents.label: Blake Perkins pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Blake Perkins flies out to right fielder Owen Caissie.

notableEvents.label: Sal Frelick pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sal Frelick singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jakob Marsee.
